AI voice agent platform. Create outbound: AI voice agent platform. Create outbound calls, manage assistants, and retrieve call details.
To obtain your Vapi API key:

  1. Log in to your [Vapi Dashboard](https://dashboard.vapi.ai).
  2. Navigate to **Organization Settings** → **API Keys**.
  3. Copy your Private API key.
Create an outbound phone call using a Va: Create an outbound phone call using a Vapi assistant.
Retrieve the details of a specific call: Retrieve the details of a specific call by its ID.
Update an existing Vapi assistant config: Update an existing Vapi assistant configuration (name, model, first message, etc.).
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
Name: Name
The ID of the Vapi assistant that will h: The ID of the Vapi assistant that will handle the call. Get this from your Vapi Dashboard.
The ID of the phone number to make the c: The ID of the phone number to make the call from. Must be a number registered in your Vapi account.
The phone number to call, in E.164 forma: The phone number to call, in E.164 format (e.g. +14155551234).
An optional name for this call for ident: An optional name for this call for identification.
Optional JSON object with assistant conf: Optional JSON object with assistant configuration overrides for this call (e.g. first message, model settings).
The unique identifier of the call to ret: The unique identifier of the call to retrieve.
The unique identifier of the assistant t: The unique identifier of the assistant to update.
A new name for the assistant.
The first message the assistant will say: The first message the assistant will say when a call starts.
Optional system prompt. Vapi does not ex: Optional system prompt. Vapi does not expose a standalone top-level instructions field on UpdateAssistantDto, so if you provide this you must also provide both Model and Provider so the system prompt can be applied via model.messages without discarding your input silently.
Optional model name (e.g. gpt-4o). Requi: Optional model name (e.g. gpt-4o). Required if updating model config.
Optional model provider (e.g. openai). R: Optional model provider (e.g. openai). Required if updating model config.
The message the assistant says before en: The message the assistant says before ending the call.
Optional JSON object with additional Upd: Optional JSON object with additional UpdateAssistantDTO fields (e.g. model, voice, transcriber settings).
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
